briefdescription.para: A concept describing an interpolation builder.

detaileddescription.para: An interpolation builder is a callable that takes function values on an interpolation mesh and computes the coefficients of an interpolation representation (e.g. spline or Lagrange) of that function.

Type information is accessed through InterpolationBuilderTraits<Builder>, which has a primary template delegating to Builder's own aliases and can be specialised for external builders (e.g. ddc::SplineBuilder).
The template alias and method requirements are verified using interpolation_idx_range_type as a representative domain.
